item.title: 2026 Men's Final Four Odds: Michigan, Arizona Lead the Way
item.description: The Final Four is creeping closer. Check out the early odds for which teams will make up the prestigious grouping come season's end.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft No. 2 Pick Odds: Arvell Reese Favored, Ty Simpson Longshot
item.description: Fernando Mendoza is the clear favorite to go No. 1 in the 2026 NFL Draft, but what about No. 2? Here are the latest odds.
